title: Florida influencer DreamDoll Brii dies at 21 after shooting in Lamborghini
summary_full: Social media influencer Brianna Johnson, known as DreamDoll Brii, died after being shot.  She was traveling in a lime green Lamborghini when a white sedan opened fire.  Two other individuals in the vehicle were critically injured and hospitalized.  Investigators believe the attackers specifically targeted the vehicle for unknown reasons.  Police are continuing their investigation and seeking public assistance for information.
